findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'mark piazza | manager, pipeline compliance and r&d colonial pipeline company o. ...' (3x).

findings.description: Email address for Jane Lea Hicks is altered — an extra 'c' is inserted, changing the address.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 CC line shows 'janeleahicks@gmail.com' (consistent with the name 'Jane Lea Hicks'). HTML renders it as 'janelecahicks@gmail.com' — an erroneous 'c' inserted between 'e' and 'a'.
